history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, messy hair and bangs is lying on a white, rumpled bedsheet. He is wearing a grey long-sleeved shirt. The man is looking towards the camera with his eyes squinted and a playful, slightly mischievous smile. His left cheek is pressed against the sheet, and his right arm is bent, with his hand out of frame. A thin white wire, possibly from earbuds, is visible near his ear. The lighting is soft and natural, casting gentle shadows that highlight the texture of the bedsheet and the contours of his face. The overall color palette is dominated by muted greys and whites, creating a relaxed and intimate atmosphere. The mood is casual, youthful, and a little cheeky. The shot is taken from a high angle, looking down at the man.
